mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_voting_mobilization_permission ( subject_id, tenant_id, building_id, user_id, role_key, can_remind, can_offline_proxy, activated_at, expires_at, deactivated_at, status ) SELECT DISTINCT #{subjectId}, ub.tenant_id, ub.building_id, ub.user_id, r.role_key, TRUE, TRUE, #{activatedAt}::timestamptz, #{expiresAt}::timestamptz, NULL::timestamptz, 1 FROM sys_user_building ub JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.user_id = ub.user_id JOIN sys_role r ON r.role_id = ur.role_id JOIN sys_user u ON u.user_id = ub.user_id WHERE ub.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND ub.status = 1 AND u.status = '0' AND r.role_key IN ('OWNER_REPRESENTATIVE', 'GRID_MEMBER')
AND ub.building_id = #{scopeReferenceId}
AND 1 = 0
ON CONFLICT (subject_id, user_id, building_id) DO UPDATE SET can_remind = EXCLUDED.can_remind, can_offline_proxy = EXCLUDED.can_offline_proxy, activated_at = EXCLUDED.activated_at, expires_at = EXCLUDED.expires_at, deactivated_at = NULL::timestamptz, status = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE t_voting_mobilization_permission SET status = 2, deactivated_at = #{deactivatedAt}::timestamptz WHERE subject_id = #{subjectId} AND status = 1
